title: Adventurous Tadka Noodles
description: An umami-rich Korean dish featuring egg noodles cooked with a blend of aromatic spices and the adventurous tadka technique, whole30-friendly and suitable for those looking for an exciting twist on traditional noodle dishes.

ingredients.name: 1 cup egg noodles
ingredients.notes: Soak in boiling water for about 5 minutes or until al dente.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup ground beef or chicken (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a protein boost and extra umami.

ingredients.name: Tadka spices mix (to taste): 2 teaspoons mustard seeds, 1 teaspoon cumin seeds, 1/4 teaspoon turmeric powder
ingredients.notes: Mix all these ingredients in a small bowl and keep warm for tadka technique.

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic to the pan. Sauté until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
If using protein (ground beef or chicken), add it now and cook for another minute until lightly browned.
Mix in soy sauce and fish sauce. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Increase heat to high, toss in tadka spices mix and the remaining sesame oil. Toss everything together quickly to avoid burning.
Add soaked egg noodles directly from boiling water into the pan with the tadka sauce. Toss well until the noodles are evenly coated and heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh coriander leaves if desired.
